curation_notes: Patch commit d9b90ae adds three XMLReader feature flags to disable external DTD loading, external general entities, and external parameter entities in the SAX-based document preprocessor's preprocess method. Only one source file was changed (not noisy). Location derived directly from the patch diff. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern — the DOM-based preprocessor delegates XML parsing to a different utility (DOMUtils.load). Vulnerability class xxe confirmed from CWE-611 and the patch content.
